title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Laurus Labs

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Laurus Labs
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Laurus Labs in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Laurus Labs:
Laurus Labs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Laurus Labs!
